source.climateVerificationNote: No climate source URL is linked for this location.

desc: Kotor is Montenegro's dramatic bay town of fortified lanes, Venetian architecture, and mountain-backed panoramas. It's spectacular year-round, but cruise arrivals and summer traffic create strong peak pressure; spring and autumn are generally calmer and better for fortress hikes and old-town exploration.

todo.name: Kotor Old Town walls
todo.desc: Wander the medieval lanes, tiny piazzas, and Venetian-era churches inside the fortifications.

todo.name: St. John Fortress hike
todo.desc: Climb the fortress steps at sunrise or late afternoon for sweeping views over the bay and mountains.

todo.name: Our Lady of the Rocks (Perast)
todo.desc: Take a short trip to Perast and visit the iconic man-made islet church and museum.

todo.name: Kotor Farmers Market
todo.desc: Sample local cheeses, cured meats, olives, and rakija around the old town market area.

todo.name: Boat loop of Bay of Kotor
todo.desc: See Kotor, Prčanj, Perast, and shoreline villages from the water for the best perspective.

todo.name: Lovćen National Park day trip
todo.desc: Drive the serpentine road to mountain viewpoints and Njegoš Mausoleum above the coast.

todo.name: Dobrota waterfront walk
todo.desc: Stroll north along the bay past stone palaces and small jetties away from old-town crowds.

todo.name: Seafood dinner by the bay
todo.desc: Enjoy black risotto, grilled fish, and mussels in konobas along Kotor and Perast waterfronts.

wifi.note: Old-town apartments and cafés are usually reliable, though thick stone walls can reduce in-room mobile signal quality.

prac.fltNote: No routine Gatwick nonstop to nearby airports. Most UK itineraries connect to Tivat, Dubrovnik, or Podgorica; return fares are often ~£95–£210 off-peak, ~£210–£340 in shoulder demand, and ~£340+ in peak summer/cruise season windows.
prac.visa: Visa-free for UK citizens — up to 90 days in any 180-day period.
alerts: Cruise ship schedules can overwhelm the old town midday in high season.
Fortress climbs are exposed with limited shade — avoid midday summer heat.
Bay road traffic and border queues (if arriving via Croatia) can add major transfer delays.

sweet: Late April to June and September to October are strongest for scenery, walking comfort, and lower crowd pressure than peak summer.
